cast.name: 克拉克·杰尔姆·威尔逊 Klarc Jerome Wilson

introduction: Lou is in the process of leaving her home town for New York where she hopes to succeed as a novel writer. Before she leaves she engages in the towns Christmas activities. There she meets Kyle who is in town to help out his aunt at her diner as he's currently between jobs as a chef. He has hopes for a head chef position in Chicago. As Lou and Kyle keeps bumping into each other during the celebrations a spark is ignited and they both gets reasons to ponder over their future plans.—Johan Hammar
